# shopcart — Overview

shopcart is a small e-commerce demo used as fixture data for the
direct-context-mcp test suite. It has a checkout flow, a REST API, an
auth module, and a billing module that integrates with Stripe.

## Tech stack

- TypeScript on Node.js
- PostgreSQL for persistence
- Stripe for payments
